allow: Bash(python -c "import pypdf; r=pypdf.PdfReader\('LuxAcademy_Storyboard_v1.0.pdf'\); print\(len\(r.pages\)\); [print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---', p.extract_text\(\)\) for i,p in enumerate\(r.pages\)]")

Bash(python -c "import pypdf; r=pypdf.PdfReader\('LuxAcademy_Storyboard_v1.0.pdf'\); print\('PAGES:', len\(r.pages\)\); [print\(f'\\n===== PAGE {i+1} =====\\n', p.extract_text\(\)\) for i,p in enumerate\(r.pages\)]")
